headings.style: Elegant, tight tracking for large text. Gives a traditional, high-end restaurant feel.

body.style: Clean, highly readable, generous line height for contrast with elegant headings.

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Generous spacing to let the dark theme breathe. Use p-8 or p-12 for content sections.
layout_and_spacing.bento_cards: Use solid dark surfaces with subtle 1px border-white/10 to avoid muddy visuals.

components.header: Sticky navigation, backdrop-blur-xl bg-black/60, border-b border-white/10. Contains Logo and Lang Toggle.
components.menu_cards: Dark flat background, 1px subtle border. Hover effect: slight lift (-translate-y-1) and image zoom. Price is prominent.
components.floating_cart: Fixed at bottom-right or center-bottom. Counter badge that updates. Uses Glassmorphism.
components.whatsapp_button: Pulsing animation. Changes to solid #25D366 when cart has items and user is ready to checkout.

motion_and_interactions.kyoto_rain_ambient: Use tsParticles or a pure CSS/Framer Motion overlay to create soft, slow-falling translucent drops and glowing lantern particle effects in the hero section.
motion_and_interactions.sushi_loader: Custom SVG or CSS-drawn sushi roll. Use Framer Motion to animate a clip-path or mask simulating 'bites' being taken out. Includes text: 'Preparando tu experiencia...'
motion_and_interactions.add_to_cart: Animate the sushi item 'flying' into the floating cart icon using framer-motion layoutId or calculated transforms. Add a subtle sound effect if possible, or visual pop on the cart counter.
motion_and_interactions.chef_character: Implement a stylized SVG Chef mascot in a floating widget or beside the cart. State changes: Idle (neutral) -> Smile/Approve (mouth path changes to smile, thumbs up motion) when adding item -> Bow (container rotates forward/scales down) -> Pops up '¡Excelente elección!' speech bubble.
motion_and_interactions.order_confirmation: Full screen modal/overlay with dark blurry background. Large chef SVG plays bowing animation. Prominent animated WhatsApp redirect button.

image_urls.description: Kyoto Pontocho alleyway illuminated by traditional lanterns and light rain
Nighttime scene in Kyoto with a person holding umbrella in rain
Illuminated traditional Japanese lanterns at night

instructions_to_main_agent: Theme: Build a dark-themed delivery site matching the Jewel & Luxury archetype. DO NOT use generic white/gray templates.
Assets: Use the provided Unsplash/Pexels URLs for images. DO NOT use placeholder text for images.
State Management: Manage cart state. Ensure the chef character reacts based on user actions (adding items).
Animations: Build the 'Sushi Loader' with Framer Motion and an SVG. Use tsParticles or Framer Motion for the 'Kyoto Rain' effect on the Hero section.
WhatsApp Integration: When the user finalizes the cart, generate a WhatsApp wa.me link with the phone number +5352473962 containing the formatted order details.
Testing: Add data-testid to ALL interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links, cart, language toggle).
Language Toggle: Add a simple ES/EN translation mechanism (dictionary/context) for main UI elements.
